# Wishlist and Favorites (demo)

## What you'll learn

This article is a synthetic example used by the article-factory test suite. It shows how the reviewer pack renders a full English body with paragraphs, lists, and images.

## Where to find your wishlist

Your wishlist sits on your profile page. It has two tabs:

- **Bookmarks** lists every product you saved.
- **Bids** lists the products where you have an active offer.

![Wishlist screen with Bookmarks and Bids tabs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Jamble-Live-Shopping/help-center/main/assets/mockups/wishlist-favorites-demo__overview__en__v3.png)

## Save a product

1. Tap the bookmark icon in the corner of the product card.
2. The icon fills and the product moves into your Bookmarks tab.
